fields.ApplyToObjectRoot: Whether to search for an object root to put the Component onto rather than the hit component or slot.
fields.EnsureSingleInstance: Whether the tool should delete existing components of the same type before adding the ones from the template.
fields.AllowPickup: Whether the tool can add components to its template list with secondary.
fields._label: The label giving information on this tool.
fields._templateRoot: The slot this tool is using to store its list of components to place onto other slots.
